sections.heading: Declarations Page
sections.text: Named insured, insured location, policy period 2026-01-01 to 2027-01-01, coverage limits, and total premium.

sections.heading: Coverage A - Dwelling
sections.text: We insure the dwelling on the residence premises against risk of direct physical loss, subject to the exclusions in Section I.

sections.heading: Coverage C - Personal Property
sections.text: We cover personal property owned or used by an insured, generally up to 50% of the Coverage A limit, subject to special limits for certain categories.

sections.heading: Coverage D - Loss of Use
sections.text: We cover the additional living expenses incurred while the residence premises is not fit to live in due to a covered loss.

sections.heading: Section I - Exclusions
sections.text: We do not insure for loss caused by flood, surface water, earth movement, or neglect, whether or not any other cause contributes to the loss.

sections.heading: Duties After Loss
sections.text: After a loss the insured must give prompt notice, protect the property from further damage, prepare an inventory, and cooperate in the investigation.

sections.heading: Definition - Actual Cash Value
sections.text: Actual cash value means the cost to replace property reduced by depreciation for age and condition.

sections.heading: Endorsement HO 04 90 - Water Backup
sections.text: This endorsement adds limited coverage, up to the sub-limit shown on the declarations, for direct loss caused by water that backs up through sewers or drains.

sections.heading: Premium Summary
sections.text: Total annual premium of 1,842.00 allocated across Section I coverages, Section II liability, and endorsements.
